productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with this leather boot from red tape. The natural hide colour lends it a natural finish enhancing your style quotient immensely, making casual dressing all the more fun.UpperFull-grain leather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleHigh ankle for absolute comfort and support to the lower leg, and enhanced styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitZipper on the medial ankle side for better fitFabric inner lining for ultimate breathability and sweat-free comfortMidsoleFabric footbed for sweat-free comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with strategically placed lugs on the forefoot and heel, and has a wooden-texture finish in the midfoot region for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
